2026-05-14.patch_summary: This patch refactors the __queued_read_unlock() and __queued_write_unlock() functions to be extracted from the queued_read_unlock() and queued_write_unlock() functions, respectively. This is a preparatory step for adding contended_release tracepoint instrumentation in a subsequent commit.
